name: Lamb Rogan Josh
description: Slow-cooked tender lamb in a rich aromatic Kashmiri sauce with whole spices.

name: Chicken Momos
description: Steamed Himalayan dumplings filled with spiced minced chicken, served with achar.

name: Dal Bhat
description: Traditional lentil soup with steamed rice, seasonal vegetables, and house pickles.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Chilled blended yoghurt drink with sweet Alphonso mango and a hint of cardamom.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in rose-flavoured sugar syrup, served warm.

name: Sekuwa
description: Flame-grilled marinated mutton skewers with Himalayan herbs and spices.
